case_title: KING XIONG CHONG RESPONDENT VS. VIVIAN LEE et al APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT CHONG, KING XIONG RECOVER FROM APPELLANT LEE, VIVIAN QUAN, GREGORY $3,730.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,752.00, DEFENDANT/APPELLANT IS FURTHER ORDERED TO RETURN TO PLAINTIFF HIS PERSON ITEMS, INCLUDING HIS PASSPORT, ID AND BOOKS. SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-07-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:20am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeals. King Xiany Chong, respondent, appears in Pro Per; Vivian Lee, appellant, appears in Pro Per. Appearing with Mr. Chong as a translator is David Tse; appearing as translator with Vivian Lee, is her son, Gregory Chong.
